archetype.name: Wellspring Mage
archetype.note: This archetype offers Spell Relay at a different level than displayed here.

feat.name: Spell Relay
feat.text: You open the power in your blood to your ally's spellcasting, using your magic to boost their range. Your ally can use you as the point of origin for their spell, calculating range and cover from your space instead of their own.

traits.name: Concentrate
traits.text: An action with this trait requires a degree of mental concentration and discipline.

traits.name: Sorcerer
traits.text: This indicates abilities from the sorcerer class.

feat.trigger: An ally Casts a Spell and you are within that spell’s range.

sections.text: This feat can be used for one or more archetypes in addition to the listed classes. When selected this way, the feat does not have its class traits.
